description: Case 04: Unstructured Excel ingestion - XLSX source with column transforms to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - case04_unstructure","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case04_unstructure/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"comma","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(CAST(ROW_ID AS STRING)), '') AS BIGINT) AS ROW_ID, NULLIF(TRIM(COLUMN_A), '') AS COLUMN_A, NULLIF(TRIM(COLUMN_B), '') AS COLUMN_B, NULLIF(TRIM(COLUMN_C), '') AS COLUMN_C, NULLIF(TRIM(COLUMN_D), '') AS COLUMN_D, NULLIF(TRIM(COLUMN_E), '') AS COLUMN_E, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(CAST(COLUMN_F AS STRING)), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS COLUMN_F, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(CAST(COLUMN_G AS STRING)), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS COLUMN_G, CURRENT_DATE() AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case04_unstructure","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case04_unstructure/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
